name: magic-globe
title: Globe
author: Magic UI
description: Renders an interactive WebGL globe with configurable markers and colors.

changes: Changed the cn import from @/lib/utils to ../../lib/utils.
Added a configurable canvas label, reduced-motion behavior, strict pointer-state comparison, and pointer-cancel handling.
Created and destroyed the Cobe instance in response to Page Visibility and Intersection Observer state, with safe restart and cleanup.
Capped the effective device pixel ratio at 2 and the square render resolution at 1200 pixels while respecting lower device and caller values.

modifications.change: Repointed the bundled utility import; added bounded accessibility, reduced-motion, and pointer repairs; gated the Cobe lifecycle on page and viewport visibility; and capped effective DPR and render resolution.
modifications.reason: Keep the copied globe self-contained and static for reduced motion while preventing its WebGL render loop from consuming resources offscreen, in a hidden tab, or after unmount.
